---
title: "GrassPatch2025 Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(visNetwork)
```


```{r}
#setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
getwd()
```

# Check pipeline status
```{r}
tar_glimpse()
```


```{r}
tar_visnetwork()
```


```{r}
tar_visnetwork(targets_only = TRUE)
```

```{r}
tar_manifest()
tar_manifest(fields = name)$name
```

# Construct pipeline
```{r}
# targets::tar_make(callr_function = NULL) # for debugging
targets::tar_make()
```

# Destroy pipeline (off by default)
```{r, warning=FALSE, eval = FALSE }
tar_destroy()
# targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)

```


# Get soil parameters in json format
```{r}
tar_read(json_soil_water)
tar_load(df_new_obs)
tar_load(df_final_observed_harv)
tar_load(file_obs)
tar_load(file_obs_mean)

tar_load(df_obs_pheno)
df <- tar_read(df_obs_pheno)
```


```{r}
tar_load(df_obs_mean_harv)
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput_haunBased)
tar_load(df_obs_mean_harv_pheno)
tar_load(df_obs_corrected)
tar_load(df_pheno_input_param)
tar_load(df_obs_hi_amounts)
tar_load(df_obs_final)
```

```{r}
names(tar_read(df_obs_final))

df<- tar_read(df_obs_final)
df %>% dplyr::select(SimulationName,Clock.Today, Wheat.Phenology.CurrentStageName, HarvestIndex) %>%
  filter(HarvestIndex >0)

 # filter(Wheat.Phenology.CurrentStageName == "HarvestRipe")
```
